name: Bait and Switch
entries: When you're within 5 feet of a creature on your turn, you can expend one Superiority Die and switch places with that creature, provided you spend at least 5 feet of movement and the creature is willing and doesn't have the {@condition Incapacitated|XPHB} condition. This movement doesn't provoke {@action Opportunity Attack|XPHB|Opportunity Attacks}.
Roll the Superiority Die. Until the start of your next turn, you or the other creature (your choice) gains a bonus to AC equal to the number rolled.
